title: 自动缓存 vs 显式缓存断点
title_en: Automatic Caching vs Explicit Cache Breakpoints

dimensions.name: 配置方式
dimensions.a: 在请求顶层加 cache_control，系统自动选择断点位置
dimensions.b: 在特定 content block 上加 cache_control，手动指定断点

dimensions.name: 断点行为
dimensions.a: 自动放在最后一个可缓存 block 上，随对话增长自动前移
dimensions.b: 固定在你指定的 block 上，不会自动移动

dimensions.name: 适用场景
dimensions.a: 多轮对话——历史消息不断增长，缓存自动跟进
dimensions.b: 需要精确控制的场景，如只缓存 system prompt 或特定长文档

dimensions.name: 断点数量
dimensions.b: 可设置多个断点（最多 4 个）

dimensions.name: Configuration
dimensions.a: Add cache_control at the request top level; system picks the breakpoint
dimensions.b: Add cache_control on specific content blocks; you choose the breakpoints

dimensions.name: Breakpoint behavior
dimensions.a: Automatically placed on the last cacheable block; moves forward as conversation grows
dimensions.b: Fixed at blocks you specify; does not move automatically

dimensions.name: Best for
dimensions.a: Multi-turn conversations where growing message history should be cached automatically
dimensions.b: Precise control — e.g., caching only the system prompt or a specific long document

dimensions.name: Number of breakpoints
dimensions.a: One breakpoint managed by the system
